name: Rice with Garlic and Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a wide skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic puree and swirl to coat the pan.
3. Stir in the cooked rice and pine nuts.
4. Continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until the rice is heated through and has absorbed the butter.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
6. Serve hot.
